testcase.classname: Authorization red-team suite (WO-029) contains at least 50 authorization scenarios
testcase.name: Authorization red-team suite (WO-029) contains at least 50 authorization scenarios

testcase.classname: Authorization red-team suite (WO-029) director-list-companies => Director GET /api/companies expects 200
